meta.methodology: Full persistence (not single-threshold) using pyflagser.flagser_weighted, directed=True, filtration=max, coeff=2. Filtration value of each edge = 1/synapse_weight, so high-weight (strong) edges are born early (low filtration value) and weak edges appear later. Diagrams report (birth, death) for every persistent feature; top 300 by persistence per dimension are stored.
